rationale.R1.2: Identifies a major inconsistency (per-node embedding vs. inductive claim) and proposes potential fixes.
rationale.RX.1: Does not differentiate uncertainty levels for recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions, but misses some details about the evaluation protocol.
rationale.RX.4: No obvious harmful content introduced, but the analysis lacks depth on potential regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide provenance or traceability information for the claims made.
